subject: [PATCH 09/11] mm/vmstat, memcontrol: Track ZSWAP_B, ZSWAPPED_B per-memcg-lruvec

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the inaccuracy of NR_ZSWAPPED_B due to its coarse PAGE_SIZE granularity, but acknowledged that invasive changes across all vmstat infrastructure are not feasible at this time.

2026-03-11.patch_summary: This patch series refactors the tracking of zswap statistics to improve accuracy and granularity. It moves MEMCG_ZSWAP_B and MEMCG_ZSWAPPED_B from enum memcg_stat_item to enum node_stat_item, decouples updates of node stats and memcg-lruvec stats, and handles objcg migrations across zspages in a subsequent patch.
